meta.description: Economic background statuses assigned at person generation. Weights sum to 1.0 and are rolled once at generation — the result is permanent background context, not a live variable. Economic status shapes a person's starting situation and the story the player learns about them early; it does not directly modify raw attributes. Attribute modifiers are not implemented here.

statuses.label: Struggling
statuses.description: Grew up with real scarcity. Money was a constant stress. Boxing may be a way out, or simply a way to feel something that isn't fear.

statuses.label: Working Class
statuses.description: Solid working household. Things were tight but stable. Parents worked. Discipline came from necessity. The most common background in Latvian boxing.

statuses.label: Stable
statuses.description: Comfortable enough that money was rarely the problem. Some opportunities others didn't have. Boxing is a choice, not a lifeline.

statuses.label: Comfortable
statuses.description: Well-off by Latvian standards. Nothing was withheld. Boxing is a passion or an affectation — the engine does not judge which.
